title: Station Casino Reno
summary:
Station Casino Reno is a cancelled hotel and casino that was located at the intersection of Kietzke Lane and South Virginia Street next to the Reno-Sparks Convention Center in Reno, Nevada. The land was owned by Station Casinos and was located on 8 acres (3.2 ha) of land.
The building design was similar to Aliante (formerly known as Aliante Station), Green Valley Ranch and Red Rock Resort.


== References ==
